diff: The Target SubDAO Proxy Value evaluation method ([A.6.1.1.1.3.4.2.2.2 - Evaluation Method](99d4b8da-fa5c-49ce-b93c-70d07334d7aa)) considers the higher of current Required Risk Capital (RRC) or highest RRC incurred within a trailing period. RRC Lookback Period defines the amount of time to review for the trailing period when evaluating the RRC component of Target SubDAO Proxy Value.
